productDisplayName: Timberland Men Toddler Grey Casual Shoes
description: This winter, dress your little one up in these timberland Ossipee H& L Gore-Tex Oxford and hit the trail in style. With comfort and rugged style, your little one's hikes are all set to get better.UpperGore-Tex enhanced suede upper for absolute durability and comfortSynthetic toe box foxing and heel guard for absolute durabilityGore-Tex mesh and padded tongue and collar for enhanced breathable comfortVelcro straps on the forefoot for a snug, customised FitPadded footbed with fabric lining for all-day breathable comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for all-day lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for absolute grip and tractionPropel technology in the toe region for absolute tractionFlex grooves in the forefoot for easy movementBrake system in the back heel for absolute grip on various terrainArched midfoot for enhanced supportshoe careWipe dust with a dry, clean clothUse a suede brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
